changelog.item: The custom filter for releases can now filter out irrelevant downloaded files at the same time.
Added sorting by the time a repository is starred.

Adjusted repository search: currently, entering a keyword triggers real-time repository name matching, while clicking AI Search will retrieve AI-analyzed content, tags, etc., speeding up search. Natural language search is temporarily disabled due to unsatisfactory results.
Add a check for updates feature
Persistent sorting for repository list
Added AI detection concurrency configuration
Unified repository card tag styles
Improved AI analysis failure indicators and added a retry button for failed items
fix: Fixed the issue where the analysis progress becomes 0 due to switching headers during AI analysis
Add drag and no-drag regions for desktop app
switch to infinite scroll with consistent card widths
fix: Sidebar now scrolls vertically when its content exceeds the screen height, preventing hidden or inaccessible items and improving navigation on smaller screens or long lists.
fix: Fixed webdav backup recovery issue.
feat: Supports multiple AI API formats and fixes connectivity testing.
feat: Added an optional Express + SQLite backend server, supporting cross-device automatic synchronization.
Added optional OpenAI Responses API support while preserving existing OpenAI Chat Completions compatibility.
Fixed repository update time display and sorting by prioritizing pushed_at, with fallback to updated_at.
Fixed white-screen crash when opening empty categories by correcting React Hook call order.
Fixed the desktop white-screen startup issue after IndexedDB migration by normalizing persisted state before first render.
Ensured seamless data migration from legacy localStorage to IndexedDB without requiring users to reset local data.
Kept rollback compatibility so users can return to older versions without losing existing data.
Added category lock support in repository edit panel to prevent sync from overwriting manual category choices.
Manual category changes now auto-enable lock by default, and users can still manually unlock later.
Improved edit modal defaults by preferring AI summary as editable custom description content.
Added repository unstar support and improved delete flow stability by handling 204 No Content responses and cleaning related release/subscription state.
Fixed desktop first-login token paste issue (Ctrl/Cmd + V) in v0.2.0-v0.2.2 builds.
Restored global search shortcuts and desktop Edit menu roles (cut/copy/paste/select all) for consistent keyboard behavior.
